title: CloudCompass Architecture Spec
description: DRAFT v0 contract from WS1 (Architecture Designer Agent) -> WS2 (CDK generator). Change requires WS1 sign-off.

project_name.description: Human-readable project name; also used to derive stack/construct names.

pattern.description: High-level architecture pattern the services compose into.
pattern.$comment: Extend this enum when the architecture designer supports more patterns.

deployment_boundary.description: MVP stops at change-set-only. Documented in the spec for traceability.

budget_monthly_usd.description: Optional monthly budget hint (informational; not enforced by the generator).

services.description: Services to provision. Each `type` MUST exist in registry.TEMPLATE_REGISTRY.

type.description: Canonical service key understood by the generator.

logical_id.description: Unique CDK construct id within the project.

config.description: Template-specific parameters. Validated per-type in a later schema revision.
config.$comment: Future versions can split this into per-type sub-schemas.
